description: Gold retrieval questions against the committed hermetic eval corpus. Each gold ref is (source_path, heading_path); source_path matches by suffix against chunk source_url, heading_path matches exactly. difficulty: 'direct' = query terms appear in the gold chunk; 'paraphrase' = natural phrasing, key terms present; 'vocabulary_mismatch' = deliberately avoids the chunk's vocabulary to expose BM25 limits.
